title: BrokerArtifactListResponse
description: Typed broker artifact-list response family that carries request correlation and safe artifact metadata.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for artifact list responses.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this artifact list response.

request_id.description: Stable request identifier copied from the request.

artifacts.description: Artifact metadata entries visible to the caller.

items.description: Artifact record entry returned by the broker.

next_cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor for continuation when present.
